metadata.description: 自顶向下设计: Top-down design breaks down complex problems into simpler sub-problems layer by layer, progressively refining each module. Here's a brief Python code example to illustrate the top-down approach in solving a problem of calculating factorial: ```python def factorial(n): # Base case: if n is 0 or 1, return 1 if n == 0 or n == 1: return 1 else: # Recursive call: n * factorial(n-1) return n * factorial(n - 1) # Example usage print(factorial(5)) # Output should be 120 ``` In this example, the problem of calculating the factorial is broken down into simpler sub-problems (calculating the factorial of a smaller number) until reaching the base case.

data_pointers.title: 自顶向下设计

Here's a brief Python code example to illustrate the top-down approach in solving a problem of calculating factorial: ```python def factorial(n): # Base case: if n is 0 or 1, return 1 if n == 0 or n == 1: return 1 else: # Recursive call: n * factorial(n-1) return n * factorial(n - 1) # Example usage print(factorial(5)) # Output should be 120 ``` In this example, the problem of calculating the factorial is broken down into simpler sub-problems (calculating the factorial of a smaller number) until reaching the base case.
